languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

languages.text: "Я... согласен. Я не желаю рассуждать о потенциальной ценности его экспериментов или образцов, не в этот раз. Все, чего касалось это омерзительное ксеносское исчадие, должно гореть. Все до последнего".
"I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

"I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

languages.text: «Estoy... de acuerdo. No quiero deliberar sobre el valor en potencia de sus experimentos o muestras, al menos en esta ocasión. Todo lo que ha tocado esa repugnante prole de xenos debe arder. Todo».
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy... de acuerdo. No quiero deliberar sobre el valor en potencia de sus experimentos o muestras, al menos en esta ocasión. Todo lo que ha tocado esa repugnante prole de xenos debe arder. Todo».

languages.text: 「私は……同意します。今回ばかりは、奴の実験や標本の潜在的価値について熟考したいとは思いません。あの忌まわしい異種族の落とし子が触れたものは、すべて焼かれねばなりません。何もかも、すべて」
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

traits.locale_text: 「私は……同意します。今回ばかりは、奴の実験や標本の潜在的価値について熟考したいとは思いません。あの忌まわしい異種族の落とし子が触れたものは、すべて焼かれねばなりません。何もかも、すべて」

languages.text: “我……同意。我不想权衡他的实验和样本价值几何，至少这一次不想。凡是那个污秽异形孽种碰过的，都必须烧掉，一件不留。”
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

traits.locale_text: “我……同意。我不想权衡他的实验和样本价值几何，至少这一次不想。凡是那个污秽异形孽种碰过的，都必须烧掉，一件不留。”

languages.text: "Ich ... stimme Euch zu. Ich will gar nicht an den potenziellen Wert seiner Experimente oder Proben denken, nicht in diesem Moment. Alles, was diese widerliche Xenosbrut berührt hat, muss brennen. Alles."
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... stimme Euch zu. Ich will gar nicht an den potenziellen Wert seiner Experimente oder Proben denken, nicht in diesem Moment. Alles, was diese widerliche Xenosbrut berührt hat, muss brennen. Alles."

languages.text: « Je suis d'accord. Je ne souhaite pas argumenter sur la valeur potentielle de ces expérimentations ou de ces échantillons. Pas cette fois. Tout ce que l'engeance xénos a touché doit brûler. Tout. »
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis d'accord. Je ne souhaite pas argumenter sur la valeur potentielle de ces expérimentations ou de ces échantillons. Pas cette fois. Tout ce que l'engeance xénos a touché doit brûler. Tout. »

languages.text: "Ben... Katılıyorum. Deneylerinin veya numunelerinin potansiyel değeri üzerinde durmak istemiyorum, en azından bu durumda. O iğrenç zeno dölünün dokunduğu her şey yanmalı. Her şey."
languages.original_text: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."
